title: style_profile
description: The synthesized, machine-readable voice fingerprint — output of the synthesizer agent, sole input to scripts/emit_skill.py. Merges all dimension_profiles, resolves conflicts, demotes under-supported axes, and carries the numeric baseline bands the emitted skill's style_metrics.py will enforce. This is the single artifact the factory turns into a standalone personal-humanizer skill.

profile_name.description: slug for the emitted skill, e.g. taewoo-urp. Used in the skill dir name humanize-<profile_name>.

display_name.description: human-facing label, e.g. 'Taewoo Park · URP proposal voice'.

note.description: e.g. 'built from a single 36k-char document; some axes advisory'.

baseline.description: target metric bands, derived from quant_profile, baked verbatim into the emitted style_metrics.py. Keys mirror quant_profile paths; each is a [min,max] band, a {min} floor, or a {max} ceiling.

dimensions.description: synthesized, deduped axis rules — same shape as dimension_profile entries, minus the transient sample_support bookkeeping.

ironclad.description: always true — the meaning-invariance covenant (references/ironclad.md) is injected into every emitted skill regardless of the author's own style.

weak_axes.description: axis_groups shipped as advisory; surfaced in the emitted skill's CONFIDENCE note.

examples.description: canonical before/after pairs chosen for the emitted skill's references/examples.md.
